title: Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Encoding
body: Practice encoding Rail Fence ciphers manually.
lesson: 2A Caesar Cipher Part 1: Pattern Recognition, 2B Caesar Cipher Part 2: Pattern Recognition, 3A Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Encoding, 3B Rail Fence Cipher Part 2: Decoding, 6A Revision 1: Mixed Challenge, 6B Revision 2: Mixed Challenge
